chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Application No.S-182 of 2016 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 22-04-2019 Miss Rizwana Jabeen Siddiqui, Advocate for the applicant Mr. Ubedullah Ghoto, Advocate for respondents Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Addl. P.G.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the applicant under instructions does not press this Criminal Miscellaneous Application. Accordingly, the same stands dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
